summary: Generated image mappings for the two new haunted houses were added, but the diff does not provide evidence that the haunted house catalog entries (including the required sub-scene) were added, nor that the required static image assets were created. Additionally, multiple unrelated frontend features appear to have been added per the frontend file summaries.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new haunted house entry named "Diner Hell" with an English scary tagline and description, including a sub-scene titled "Kitchen Nightmares" stored in the haunted house data.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff snippet of the haunted house catalog does not show an entry for "Diner Hell" or any sub-scene titled "Kitchen Nightmares"; only existing houses are visible in the provided truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new haunted house entry named "Toxic Trails Science" with an English scary tagline and description.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff snippet of the haunted house catalog does not show an entry for "Toxic Trails Science" in the provided truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add generated image asset mappings that point to newly generated static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated for "Diner Hell" and "Toxic Trails Science".
missing_requirements.reason: While mappings were added in generatedImages.ts, the diff shows no new files added under frontend/public/assets/generated (Added files: none), so the required static assets are not evidenced as present.
